name: great_power
query: ("United States" OR America OR "U.S." OR China OR Russia) AND (diplomacy OR sanctions OR military OR "defense ministry" OR "foreign ministry")

name: middle_east
query: (Iran OR Israel OR Gaza OR Lebanon OR Syria OR Yemen OR "Red Sea") AND (strike OR ceasefire OR militia OR sanctions OR nuclear)

name: europe_security
query: (NATO OR Ukraine OR Kremlin OR "Black Sea" OR Poland OR Baltic) AND (aid OR missile OR drone OR mobilization OR escalation)

name: energy_trade
query: (OPEC OR oil OR LNG OR gas OR "shipping lane" OR "Strait of Hormuz") AND (sanctions OR embargo OR disruption OR price OR tanker)
